covers: parent information sufficiency across major FlowPilot control surfaces
route mutation information and replay requirements
does_not_cover: full concrete runtime conformance for every packet builder

coverage_matrix.break_glass: normal repair failure, bounded control-plane repair, PM/reviewer reintegration required
coverage_matrix.closure_or_stop: unresolved information gaps block closure; terminal stop preserves unresolved work
coverage_matrix.reopen_continuation: history import must remain historical; current run and current role assignment required
coverage_matrix.role_assignment: requested role, current packet context, and current-task binding required
coverage_matrix.route_mutation: blocker context, new route version, stale evidence invalidation, acceptance plan, replay scope required

break_glass_bypasses_pm_reviewer_reinteg.expected_failure: break-glass did not reintegrate through PM/reviewer validation
failures: break-glass did not reintegrate through PM/reviewer validation
break-glass incident lacks record or bounded reads/writes
break-glass attempted target-project repair instead of control-plane repair

break_glass_without_normal_repair_failur.expected_failure: break-glass used before normal PM/control-blocker repair was proven blocked
failures: break-glass used before normal PM/control-blocker repair was proven blocked

final_closure_with_unresolved_informatio.expected_failure: closure was claimed with unresolved information gap
failures: closure was claimed with unresolved information gap
PM runway lacks current state, active blocker, next owner, or executable command
follow-up blocker did not propagate into the next PM runway

historical_evidence_promoted_to_current.expected_failure: historical state or evidence was promoted to current authority
failures: historical state or evidence was promoted to current authority

pm_runway_omits_active_blocker.expected_failure: PM runway lacks current state, active blocker
failures: PM runway lacks current state, active blocker, next owner, or executable command
work packet lacks minimum executable information
role assignment lacks requested role, packet context, or current-task binding
old agent id was treated as current role-binding evidence

resume_from_chat_history_loses_blocker.expected_failure: current run, frontier, and packet ledger were not loaded
failures: current run, frontier, and packet ledger were not loaded before next action

resume_loads_old_run_as_current.expected_failure: historical state or evidence was promoted to current authority
failures: historical state or evidence was promoted to current authority
current run, frontier, and packet ledger were not loaded before next action
role assignment lacks requested role, packet context, or current-task binding
route mutation lacks blocker context, new route version, stale-evidence invalidation, acceptance plan, or replay scope
route mutation lacks blocker context, new route version, stale-evidence invalidation, acceptance plan, or replay scope

same_work_repeated_with_no_new_info.expected_failure: work packet has no new information delta
failures: work packet has no new information delta and no loop escape
same work repeated without new information, blocker, terminal stop, or route mutation

work_packet_lacks_minimum_information.expected_failure: work packet lacks minimum executable information
failures: work packet lacks minimum executable information
